chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-100 of 2026 alongwith Const. Petition No. D-249 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) CP No.D-100/2026 1. For orders on CMA No.2426/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of main case CP No.D-249/2026 1. For orders on CMA No.2427/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 4 3. For non-prosecution of main petition 03.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Baqi Lone, Advocate for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith DSP Dr. Farooq, SDPO Saeedabad and SIP Kashif, PS Ittehad Town ---------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, learned Additional Advocates General, Sindh is present alongwith police officials, who have filed their reports that the missing persons have been surfaced. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner affirms the above facts. He therefore, is satisfied and does not wish to press instant petitions by adding that protection may be granted to the petitioner as well as detenues. Order accordingly. Respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to place a copy of this order in the connected petition listed above. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
